title: Sour Creamy Croatian Cheese Pasta
description: A rich and tangy Croatian-inspired pasta dish featuring unwaxed lemon, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings. This kosher-friendly recipe combines creamy cheese with a hint of sourness from the lemon and a touch of Croatian tradition.

ingredients.name: croatian cheese
ingredients.notes: such as PAŠKI SIR or similar

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the minced garlic. Cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the olive oil to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and butter.
Zest the unwaxed lemon and add the zest to the skillet. Cook for an additional minute.
Squeeze the juice of the unwaxed lemon into the skillet, being careful not to add any seeds or pulp.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, sour cream, and Croatian cheese. Toss until the cheese is melted and the pasta is well coated.
Add the garlic and lemon mixture from the skillet to the bowl with the pasta and toss to combine.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
